name: child_entry_size_exceeds_parent
reason: The hierarchical constraint entry_size(i) == entry_size(i+1) * num_entries(i+1) with num_entries >= 1 means a child layer's entry size can never exceed its parent's; proving otherwise reveals an inconsistent hierarchy

name: inv_allows_zero_num_entries
